values.value: Flags users who exported more than fifty reports in the last twenty-four hours, based on ReportExport rows in EventLogFile. High-volume report export by a single user is a leading indicator of data exfiltration, especially when correlated with login anomalies, new OAuth tokens, or off-hours activity on the same user.

Confirm with the user (or their manager) whether the export burst was expected. If unexpected, freeze the user, revoke active sessions and OAuth tokens, review the exported reports for sensitive data, and notify the data-owner team. If the burst aligns with a known migration or audit, document the exception and tune the threshold.
